purpose: Define source-safe preview validation for per-user mailbox configuration, email drafts and manual email traceability without reading, sending or connecting a real provider.
mailboxRules: Mailbox is configured per user, not globally for the tenant only.
emailAddressRef must be an alias or opaque reference in preview; raw personal emails are not required and should be avoided.
placeholder_no_send and fictitious_placeholder_no_send cannot send or read real mail.
manual_only and manual_contact_only can log manual traceability but cannot read or send provider email.
connected_future is a future state only and does not enable runtime in Phase A preview.
Provider secrets, OAuth tokens and SMTP credentials must never be present in repo or preview input.
mailActionRules: Draft preview is not email sent.
Manual log only is not provider proof.
External sent confirmation must be explicit and manual.
Mail actions must link to a safe entityRef such as postulation, visit, assignment, liquidation or academy item.
Raw bodies and raw attachments are blocked in Phase A preview.
Template variables must use safe operational values and opaque refs.
claudePrototypeImpact: Email UI must not say connected/sent/read while gates are off.
Show mailbox states: not configured, manual only, placeholder no send, connection requested, provider pending.
Drafts and manual logs must be visually separate from sent email.
Do not expose raw personal email, message body or attachments in shopper-visible views.
Email actions should link to entities without implying real provider sync.

newLessons: Difference between mailbox configured and provider connected
Why a draft is not sent
Which email data must not be stored in preview
interactiveChecklists: Before assigning a mailbox to a user
Before enabling a provider in the future

hardStops: Do not read real email from this preview.
Do not send real email from this preview.
Do not connect OAuth or SMTP from this preview.
Do not store provider secrets or tokens.
Do not process raw email bodies or raw attachments.
Do not treat placeholder email as deliverable.
Do not mark sent unless manual external confirmation exists.
